常量字段值

目录

  • com.easylive.*

com.easylive.*

  • com.easylive.entity.constants.Constants 
    限定符和类型 常量字段 值
    public static final String FILE_COVER "cover/"
    public static final String FILE_FOLDER "file/"
    public static final String FILE_FOLDER_TEMP "temp/"
    public static final String FILE_VIDEO "video/"
    public static final String IMAGE_THUMBNAIL_SUFFIX "_thumbnail.jpg"
    public static final String M3U8_NAME "index.m3u8"
    public static final String REDIS_KEY_CATEGORY_LIST "easylive:category:list:"
    public static final String REDIS_KEY_FILE_DEL "easylive:file:list:del:"
    public static final String REDIS_KEY_PREFIX "easylive:"
    public static final String REDIS_KEY_QUEUE_TRANSFER "easylive:queue:transfer:"
    public static final String REDIS_KEY_QUEUE_VIDEO_PLAY "easylive:queue:video:play:"
    public static final String REDIS_KEY_SYS_SETTING "easylive:sysSetting:"
    public static final String REDIS_KEY_TOKEN_ADMIN "easylive:token:admin:"
    public static final String REDIS_KEY_TOKEN_WEB "easylive:token:web:"
    public static final String REDIS_KEY_UPLOADING_FILE "easylive:uploading:"
    public static final String REDIS_KEY_VIDEO_PLAY_COUNT "easylive:video:playcount:"
    public static final String REDIS_KEY_VIDEO_PLAY_COUNT_ONLINE "easylive:video:play:online:count:%s"
    public static final String REDIS_KEY_VIDEO_PLAY_COUNT_ONLINE_PREFIX "easylive:video:play:online:"
    public static final String REDIS_KEY_VIDEO_PLAY_COUNT_USER "easylive:video:play:online:user:%s:%s"
    public static final String REDIS_KEY_VIDEO_PLAY_COUNT_USER_PREFIX "user:"
    public static final String REDIS_KEY_VIDEO_SEARCH_COUNT "easylive:video:search:"
    public static final String REGEX_PASSWORD "^(?=.*[A-Za-z])(?=.*\\d)(?=.*[@$!%*?&\u3002.\'-+=()])[A-Za-z\\d@$!%*?&.]{8,18}$"
    public static final String TEMP_VIDEO_NAME "/temp.mp4"
    public static final String TOKEN_ADMIN "adminToken"
    public static final String TOKEN_WEB "token"
    public static final String TS_NAME "index.ts"
    public static final String VIDEO_CODE_HEVC "hevc"
    public static final String VIDEO_CODE_TEMP_FILE_SUFFIX "_temp"
